enrichment.summary: Kyle posts a late-night vlog apologizing for the delay in uploading, explaining that a new OS installation broke his video compression software. He briefly mentions visiting the Apple Store, watching Hell's Wheels on Netflix at his mom's house, and making progress on a 3D modeling project (Nutriculus and buildings around a forum).
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Really likes it; calls it a good show
Super motivated and fired up to keep building it out
Frustrated but plans to resolve it the next day

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He took forever to do the video because he didn't have the program to condense the video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He didn't have the program because he had to put the new operating system in, which rendered his old video reduction program obsolete.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He needs to get the upgrade for his video reduction program.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was going to talk to the person at the Apple store about it today but forgot.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He was postponing doing the video because he was watching TV at his mom's house.

claims.subject: Hell's Wheels
claims.claim: He really liked the TV show Hell's Wheels on Netflix about the West.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He finished the Nutriculus and it wasn't that much work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is now working on buildings around the forum.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He is super fired up and motivated to power through his work.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to do the survey and make the buildings 3D, one building at a time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He can't make the video smaller or render it smaller.

claims.subject: Kyle's mom
claims.claim: His mom's internet isn't that fast because she poaches off her neighbor.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He plans to figure out a way to condense his videos again tomorrow.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: He wasn't really listening too much to the history of the Zantan today.

transcript.text: Hello Living in Boulder Vlog for December 11th, 2016.
It's 11.52 at night on the 12th.

I didn't have the program to condense the video
So I thought I was going to get it. I didn't have the program because I had to
Put the new operating system in and so it rendered my old
Video reduction program obsolete
So I guess I have to go and get the upgrade or something. It doesn't work anymore
From that and I was going to talk to the person at the Apple store about it today
Because I went in today but I forgot to talk to her about it and then I
Was postponing doing the video because I was watching TV
At my mom's house. This TV show called Hell's Wheels on Netflix about the West.
I really like it. It was a good stony show while I was working on my site.
I finished the Nutriculus. It wasn't that much work
And now I'm working on buildings around the forum.
So yeah, I'm super, super fired up still. Super hammered.
I'm motivated to, yeah, to power this out.
Do the survey and all that stuff and then make them 3D.
Just one building at a time.
Um, so, um, what was I talking about?
Um, oh yeah, so I can't make this smaller, render this smaller.
Um, and my mom's internet, I don't think it's that fast because she poaches off her neighbor
Anyway so I should probably cut this short and then tomorrow though I'll make sure
To figure out, to get a way to condense my videos again so I can just upload them
Right away so, uh, so yeah, uh, nothing else.
Oh yeah, it wasn't, so I wasn't really listening too much to the history of the Zantan today
Which is the TV.
Um, yes, okay, so, peace out.
